# Verza TV

> Verza TV is a premium micro drama platform pioneering serialized vertical entertainment — short, cinematic episodes built for mobile, created by entertainment industry veterans.

Verza TV produces and distributes premium micro dramas: serialized, story-driven vertical episodes that differ from generic social media clips. The platform connects creators, brands, and viewers around a new category of mobile-first premium entertainment.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Verza TV and its premium micro drama platform.
- [About](/about): The company, mission, and vision behind Verza TV.
- [Team](/team): Leadership and the people building Verza TV.
- [News](/news): Latest announcements and company updates.
- [Press](/press): Press coverage and media resources.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles and working at Verza TV.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers to common questions about the platform.

## Optional

- [Licensing](/licensing): Content licensing information.
